hypothesis_tested: Adding explicit pass/fail criteria per check and a self-check warning to fix inverted scoring logic
notes: v1 fixed the inverted scoring bug — April 4-5 runs show correct PASS/WARN/FAIL verdicts with proper justification. However April 6 introduced a new failure mode: 20+ files all failed with 'Structure validation failed - not a valid array of issue objects', including files that correctly passed on April 4-5 (spf13-viper, thealgorithms-python, winstonjs-winston, trekhleb-javascript-algorithms). Two root causes: (1) already-linted file detection is too vague — the model doesn't know how to search lint-log.md for filenames, so it re-processes files that already passed; (2) structural check is triggering false positives — the model may be confused by the lint-log content or wrapper objects when re-reading files. v2 will add explicit grep pattern for dedup check and a verify-before-FAIL step for structural validation.
